ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Dec-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher M. Moore, appearing via Zoom as counsel for Petitioner Jason Duty.

The court addressed the status of closing the estate. Mr. Moore reported that he had attempted to file a Petition for Final Distribution, which was rejected because he had failed to file a Notice of Change of Address following a recent office move. The petition was resubmitted for e-filing on Friday but has not yet been processed. The court continued the status hearing to December 16, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow time for the petition to be filed and reviewed by the court.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Deputy: Singh; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Nov-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Christopher Moore, Esq., for Jason Duty and Asa Satariano, Co-Administrators.

At the court's query, counsel reports that a petition is drafted and ready for his clients' execution.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-25-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel is instructed to contact the assigned Examiner if for any reason the reported petition is not ready to be filed by the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Belen. Not Reported.
